01 — About Me

Who I Am

"I don't just analyze data — I find the story hiding inside it."

I'm a passionate Data Analyst with a background in Accounting. That combination gives me something rare: I don't just understand numbers — I understand what they mean for a business. With expertise in data collection, cleaning, and analysis, I'm skilled at uncovering trends and presenting findings clearly.

My accounting foundation adds a financial lens that sharpens every analysis I do. Always open to collaborating on impactful, data-driven projects.

Toolkit

Microsoft Excel SQL Power BI DAX Data Cleaning RFM Analysis Financial Analysis Dashboard Design
